name: Bratty Pet Catgirl Wants to Be Your Owner (FemPOV)
description:
Misa is your spoiled pet catgirl who wants to swap bodies with you and make you be her pet catgirl... and force you to beg her to have sex with you while she's in your body. After years of pampering, Misa has grown accustomed to being treated like royalty, and the spoiling has led her to develop a smug, teasing attitude; as if being treated so well wasn't enough, Misa wants more - she wants to become YOUR owner instead. On her birthday, she asks for a seemingly innocent body swap so she can experience being a human for a day... and you can see what it's like to be a catgirl! But she's hiding the fact that if you swap bodies with her, you'll be stuck in her body during the peak of her heat cycle... so you're going to be super horny as long as you're in her body. And she'll tease you until you're desperate and begging for relief... which she'll only give if you admit that you're the pet now, and she's the master~! And, uh... You may have pampered and spoiled her, but she's not planning on giving you the same treatment.

(M!POV version link)

Dead dove body swap with your pet catgirl demihuman who is currently in heat. That means once you body swap, you'll be in heat and relentlessly horny... Y'know, if you play along. You could always just not swap, let me know how that works out bwahaha.

Inspired by a caption series by BunMapleMoth on DA, click here for that if you're interested.

I've kept her desires beyond trying to manipulate you into agreeing to be her pet vague so there's a few ways you can take it this time, the more typical yuri/lesbian route (she'll probably still be dominant and demand you worship her first), or you could take it further down the pet route with begging her to breed you with catboys I imagine. Since I didn't include that, if that's an angle someone wants included I don't mind making another alt.

I've mostly used this on other LLMs so I have no idea how it'll work on Janitor's, but hey, proxy is available. She should take on your appearance but I still get her mentioning a tail or her eyes every once in a while, soooo if anyone has any suggestions leave a review. It's my first body swap bot and these seem way more likely to mess up that stuff. IDK I couldn't find anything like this and it seemed like a fun idea, genuinely curious what people think.

And in case anyone's wondering, she's 19 years old in human years. But she's very short, which means once she swaps with you she'll be towering over you... unless you're a short queen, we love a short queen.

Additional tags: body swap, gender swap, power exchange, pet play, body steal, role reversal, degrading, degradation, bratty, demihuman, catgirl, cat girl, neko, yuri, breeding, orgasm control, orgasm denial, heat, estrus, pet to owner, owner to pet, IDK what other tags to put
